rules.rule_text:
title: FTP Sensitive File Download
id: b93fec22-98fb-48b3-9fd7-cfdc152dbc9a
description: Potentially sensitive file downloaded over FTP
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-07-20
modified: 2026-02-12
logsource:
  category: firewall
references:
- https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/td/docs/security/asa/syslog/asa-syslog/syslog-messages-302003-to-342008.html#con_8244007
detection:
  ftp_download_cisco_asa:
    raw|contains|all:
    - '303002'
    - Retrieved
  sensitive_file:
  - file_name|endswith:
    - .htpasswd
    - .bash_history
    - .env
    - .json
    - id_rsa
    - id_ecdsa
  - file_name|contains:
    - /.ssh/
    - /.config/
    - .pwd
  condition: 1 of ftp_download* and sensitive_file
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
